tool_input.command: bash /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/scripts/full-text-search.sh "相関バリデーション" "バリデーション" "ValidateFor" "ValidationContext" "correlatedItem" "一致チェック"

KNOWLEDGE_DIR="/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge"
MAX_RESULTS=15

keywords=("相関バリデーション" "ValidateFor" "ValidationContext" "correlatedItem" "バリデーション" "一致チェック" "validation")

count_exprs=""
for kw in "${keywords[@]}"; do
  if [ -n "$count_exprs" ]; then
    count_exprs="$count_exprs + "
  fi
  escaped=$(echo "$kw" | sed 's/[.[\\(*+?{|^$]/\\&/g')
  count_exprs="${count_exprs}(if test(\"$escaped\"; \"i\") then 1 else 0 end)"
done

find "$KNOWLEDGE_DIR" -name "*.json" | sort | while read -r filepath; do
  relpath="${filepath#$KNOWLEDGE_DIR/}"
  jq -r --arg file "$relpath" \
    '.sections[] |
     ((.title + " " + .content) | '"$count_exprs"') as $score |
     select($score > 0) |
     "\($score)\t\($file)|\(.id)"' \
    "$filepath" 2>/dev/null
done | sort -t$'\t' -k1 -rn | head -n "$MAX_RESULTS" | cut -f2

KNOWLEDGE_DIR="/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge"
MAX_RESULTS=15

count_exprs='(if test("相関バリデーション"; "i") then 1 else 0 end) + (if test("ValidateFor"; "i") then 1 else 0 end) + (if test("ValidationContext"; "i") then 1 else 0 end) + (if test("correlatedItem"; "i") then 1 else 0 end) + (if test("バリデーション"; "i") then 1 else 0 end) + (if test("validation"; "i") then 1 else 0 end)'

find "$KNOWLEDGE_DIR" -name "*.json" | sort | while read -r filepath; do
  relpath="${filepath#$KNOWLEDGE_DIR/}"
  jq -r --arg file "$relpath" \
    '.sections[] |
     ((.title + " " + .content) | '"$count_exprs"') as $score |
     select($score > 0) |
     "\($score)\t\($file)|\(.id)"' \
    "$filepath" 2>/dev/null
done | sort -t$'\t' -k1 -rn | head -n "$MAX_RESULTS" | cut -f2

for f in \
  "component/libraries/libraries-bean-validation.json" \
  "component/libraries/libraries-nablarch-validation.json" \
  "component/libraries/libraries-validation-functional-comparison.json" \
  "processing-pattern/web-application/web-application-application-design.json" \
  "processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-application-design.json" \
  "processing-pattern/http-messaging/http-messaging-application-design.json" \
  "development-tools/testing-framework/testing-framework-02-entityUnitTestWithNablarchValidation.json" \
  "processing-pattern/mom-messaging/mom-messaging-application-design.json" \
  "processing-pattern/nablarch-batch/nablarch-batch-application-design.json" \
  "component/libraries/libraries-tag.json" \
  "component/libraries/libraries-failure-log.json" \
  "development-tools/toolbox/toolbox-NablarchOpenApiGenerator.json" \
  "processing-pattern/web-application/web-application-getting-started-project-update.json"; do
  base="/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/$f"
  jq -r --arg ff "$f" '.sections[] | {id, score: ((.title + " " + .content) | (if test("相関バリデーション";"i") then 1 else 0 end) + (if test("ValidateFor";"i") then 1 else 0 end) + (if test("ValidationContext";"i") then 1 else 0 end) + (if test("correlatedItem";"i") then 1 else 0 end) + (if test("バリデーション";"i") then 1 else 0 end) + (if test("validation";"i") then 1 else 0 end))} | select(.score > 0) | "\(.score)\t\($ff)|\(.id)"' "$base" 2>/dev/null
done | sort -t$'\t' -k1 -rn | head -n 15

jq -r --arg f "component/libraries/libraries-nablarch-validation.json" '.sections[] | {id,score:((.title+" "+.content)|(if test("相関バリデーション";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("ValidateFor";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("ValidationContext";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("correlatedItem";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("バリデーション";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("validation";"i") then 1 else 0 end))} | select(.score>0) | "\(.score)\t\($f)|\(.id)"' /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-nablarch-validation.json > /tmp/search_results.txt 2>/dev/null
jq -r --arg f "component/libraries/libraries-bean-validation.json" '.sections[] | {id,score:((.title+" "+.content)|(if test("相関バリデーション";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("ValidateFor";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("ValidationContext";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("correlatedItem";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("バリデーション";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("validation";"i") then 1 else 0 end))} | select(.score>0) | "\(.score)\t\($f)|\(.id)"' /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-bean-validation.json >> /tmp/search_results.txt 2>/dev/null
jq -r --arg f "component/libraries/libraries-validation-functional-comparison.json" '.sections[] | {id,score:((.title+" "+.content)|(if test("相関バリデーション";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("ValidateFor";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("ValidationContext";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("correlatedItem";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("バリデーション";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("validation";"i") then 1 else 0 end))} | select(.score>0) | "\(.score)\t\($f)|\(.id)"' /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-validation-functional-comparison.json >> /tmp/search_results.txt 2>/dev/null
jq -r --arg f "development-tools/testing-framework/testing-framework-02-entityUnitTestWithNablarchValidation.json" '.sections[] | {id,score:((.title+" "+.content)|(if test("相関バリデーション";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("ValidateFor";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("ValidationContext";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("correlatedItem";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("バリデーション";"i") then 1 else 0 end)+(if test("validation";"i") then 1 else 0 end))} | select(.score>0) | "\(.score)\t\($f)|\(.id)"' /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/development-tools/testing-framework/testing-framework-02-entityUnitTestWithNablarchValidation.json >> /tmp/search_results.txt 2>/dev/null
sort -t$'\t' -k1 -rn /tmp/search_results.txt | head -n 15 | cut -f2
